recorderCommand: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 1 --status needs_retry --notes "anonymous aggregate note" --dry-run
goal: Get the first real Noor subscriber signal without sending a newsletter or enabling checkout.

summary.nextAction: Send the direct DM copy to two families who already know the project.

executionState.headline: Day 2 outreach can continue while analytics and subscriber evidence remain in safe wait.
canDoNow: Open the planned tracked link once to confirm attribution.
Share only the Day 2 planned parent copy for direct_dm.
Record the posted state after previewing the no-PII log command.
waitingFor: Cloudflare Analytics Engine credentials or enablement for aggregate reporting.
At least one real Noor subscriber signal before newsletter readiness changes.
mustNotDo: Do not send a Noor newsletter while readiness is safe_wait_subscriber_empty.
Do not add payment, price, checkout, or product purchase language.
Do not record email, name, phone, address, subscriber IDs, or MailerLite IDs.

nextActionHandoff.label: Direct family DM
nextActionHandoff.action: Send the direct DM copy to two families who already know the project.
nextActionHandoff.copy:
I thought your family might like this tiny Noor story pack.
Free 3-minute Arabic-Chinese story pack: https://fursay.com/share/noor?source_id=noor_first_subscriber_sprint_direct_dm&creator=fursay&placement=direct_dm
No payment. It just helps test whether families want this kind of bilingual routine.

localizedCopy.ar:
تذكرت أن عائلتكم قد تحب تجربة قصة نور القصيرة.
حزمة عربية-صينية مجانية في 3 دقائق: https://fursay.com/share/noor?source_id=noor_first_subscriber_sprint_direct_dm&creator=fursay&placement=direct_dm
لا يوجد دفع. نريد فقط معرفة إن كانت هذه الطريقة مفيدة للعائلات.
localizedCopy.en:
I thought your family might like this tiny Noor story pack.
Free 3-minute Arabic-Chinese story pack: https://fursay.com/share/noor?source_id=noor_first_subscriber_sprint_direct_dm&creator=fursay&placement=direct_dm
No payment. It just helps test whether families want this kind of bilingual routine.

nextActionHandoff.expectedSignal: A noor direct_dm open, modal open, or submit success signal.
nextActionHandoff.recorderPostedCommand: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 2 --status posted --notes "shared noor_growth_signals_7d tracked link; waiting for anonymous aggregate report" --next-action "run npm run noor:sprint:review after the event report is available" --dry-run
nextActionHandoff.recorderPostedApplyCommand: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 2 --status posted --notes "shared noor_growth_signals_7d tracked link; waiting for anonymous aggregate report" --next-action "run npm run noor:sprint:review after the event report is available"
nextActionHandoff.recorderDryRunCommand: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 2 --status needs_retry --notes "checked noor_growth_signals_7d aggregate only" --next-action "wait for aggregate signal or retry the next planned placement" --dry-run
nextActionHandoff.privacyBoundary: Record anonymous aggregate evidence only; do not store email, name, phone, address, subscriber IDs, or MailerLite IDs.

operatorChecklist.label: Copy the planned parent note
operatorChecklist.action: Use the Arabic parent copy from the next-action handoff without adding price, checkout, or payment language.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The shared message contains the planned tracked Fursay link and no personal subscriber data.

operatorChecklist.label: Open the tracked link before sharing
operatorChecklist.action: Open the primary link once and confirm it lands on the Noor story pack or sample preview with the expected source_id and placement.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The URL remains on fursay.com and keeps the planned source_id, creator, and placement attribution.

operatorChecklist.label: Record the posted state
operatorChecklist.action: Preview: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 2 --status posted --notes "shared noor_growth_signals_7d tracked link; waiting for anonymous aggregate report" --next-action "run npm run noor:sprint:review after the event report is available" --dry-run | Apply after confirming the preview: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 2 --status posted --notes "shared noor_growth_signals_7d tracked link; waiting for anonymous aggregate report" --next-action "run npm run noor:sprint:review after the event report is available"
operatorChecklist.evidence: The log records only posted/awaiting-report status, public source_id, placement, and non-identifying notes; the apply command is the same command without --dry-run.

operatorChecklist.label: Review anonymous aggregate results
operatorChecklist.evidence: Use noor_growth_signals_7d or the listed report query; record signal evidence only as aggregate counts, never names or emails.

days.label: Parent group seed
days.action: Post the parent-group copy in one warm Arabic-speaking parent group.
days.notes: noor_growth_signals_7d aggregate shows 6 Noor subscribe submit success signal(s)
days.nextAction: prepare Noor newsletter readiness review without enabling checkout

days.label: Direct family DM
days.action: Send the direct DM copy to two families who already know the project.
days.expectedSignal: A noor direct_dm open, modal open, or submit success signal.
days.nextAction: Wait until the previous day has been tried or skipped.

days.label: Worksheet preview follow-up
days.action: Use the worksheet preview only with families who ask what is inside.
days.expectedSignal: A sample preview or product info click before the story-pack link.
days.nextAction: Wait until the previous day has been tried or skipped.

days.label: Printable PDF follow-up
days.action: Share the PDF sample when a parent asks for printable or offline material.
days.expectedSignal: A pdf_sample_followup event followed by a story-pack visit.
days.nextAction: Wait until the previous day has been tried or skipped.

days.label: Repeat best response
days.action: Repeat the highest-response placement once; do not add price or checkout copy.
days.expectedSignal: More Noor subscribe opens without payment-link exposure.
days.nextAction: Wait until the previous day has been tried or skipped.

days.label: Check first signal
days.action: Run the event report and look for one Noor submit success or clear product-interest signal.
days.nextAction: Wait until the previous day has been tried or skipped.

days.label: Decision checkpoint
days.action: Keep Noor in safe wait if there is no subscriber signal; otherwise prepare newsletter readiness review.
days.nextAction: Wait until the previous day has been tried or skipped.
